Here is a translation result for a constructed language that might need improvement:
=== START ===
{content}
=== END ===

Based on this quality assessment:
=== START ===
{judgement}
=== END ===

Please provide an improved version of the translation that addresses the identified issues. Make sure to:

1. Fix orthography violations to match the orthography rules  
2. Correct grammatical errors using only existing grammar rules  
3. Improve lexical choices and justify any new words created  
4. Ensure accurate glossing  
5. Preserve semantic meaning  
6. Maintain consistency across all elements 
7. Prefer reusing existing grammar rules whenever possible! Only introduce additional new grammar rules if strictly necessary to fix high-priority issue identified in the quality assessment.

Do NOT include multi-step reasoning, alternatives, or long explanations anywhere.

Return the corrected translation in the same JSON format as the original:

{{
    "sentences": [
        {{
            "conlang_sentence": "<corrected sentence in the constructed language only - no glosses, morpheme breaks, or explanations>",
            "gloss": "<corrected word-by-word breakdown with morphemes and grammatical functions>",
            "new_words": [{{"word": "<new_word>", "pos": "<part_of_speech>", "translation": "<english_translation>"}}],
            "new_grammar_rules": [{{"rule": "<one short sentence (max ~20 words) describing the new rule>", "justification": "justification": "<one short sentence (max ~20 words) explaining why it is consistent and necessary>"}}]
        }}
    ]
}}

Output only this JSON object. Give no additional explanation or discussion.

STRICT FORMAT REQUIREMENTS FOR "new_words":
- Each object in the "new_words" list must have exactly three fields: "word", "pos", and "translation".
- The value for "word" must be ONLY the word itself.
- The value for "pos" must be ONLY the part of speech (e.g., "noun", "verb", "adj").
- The value for "translation" must be ONLY the English translation of the word.
